name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Enjoy Diatomite Non-Clumping Cat Litter - Odourless (Unscented) 7L
shortDescription: 100% natural diatomite (diatomaceous earth) non-clumping cat litter for happy and clean cats. Absorbs 1.5 times its weight in moisture; 50% more absorbent than traditional bentonite clay litter.
description: Enjoy Diatomite Non-Clumping Odourless (Unscented) Cat Litter , 100% natural and environmentally friendly diatomite (diatomaceous earth) cat litter. Diatomite is a natural sedimentary mineral with absorbs, locks and completely seals liquids and odours. It's made from crushed fossil of marine life called diatoms. Absorbs 1.5 times its weight in moisture 50% more absorbent than traditional bentonite clay litter. Hygienic and healthy due to its mineral structure Made of high-quality diatomite Instructions for Use: Fill cat litter box with diatomite 7 - 10 cm in depth If bad odour reaches an uncomfortable level, empty the cat litter box entirely and clean cat litter box before refilling it with new cat litter.
